product_1_description.en: Comprehensive data on Canadians aged 18 and older, covering media consumption, technology adoption, and digital behaviours

product_2_description.en: Insights into the media and technology habits of Canadians aged 2–17

product_3_description.en: Research focused on Canadians who have arrived within the past five years, offering valuable insights into settlement, media usage, and technology adoption

product_4_description.en: Comprehensive demographic and population data for enhanced analysis and targeting.
